nasb.text: Then Boaz said to his servant who was in charge of the reapers, “Whose young woman is this?”

esv.text: Then Boaz said to his young man who was in charge of the reapers, “Whose young woman is this?”

cnv.text: 波阿斯問那監督收割的僕人：“那是誰家的姑娘呢？”

ccb.text: 波阿斯问负责收割的工头说：“那是谁家的女子？”

csbs.text: 波阿斯问那监督收割的仆人：“这是谁家的年轻女子呢？”
